items.title: Coders Cup 2025
items.subtitle: Head / Lead Organizer
items.description: Directed a cross-functional team of 30+ members to deliver a nationwide competitive programming event for 1,000+ participants. Architected the contest platform infrastructure, ensuring sub-second latency for real-time leaderboards and concurrent code submissions. Managed end-to-end execution from planning to delivery.

items.title: Academic Excellence
items.subtitle: Recognition & Achievements
items.description: Dean's List recipient for academic excellence at FAST-NUCES. Top 10% ranking on LeetCode with 300+ problems solved. Certified in Python Fundamentals (Microsoft) and Data Analysis (IBM). Consistently maintaining high academic standards while working on impactful projects.

items.title: Community Impact
items.subtitle: Mentorship & Contribution
items.description: Created Sénior platform connecting 100+ juniors with verified mentors, reducing administrative overhead by 90%. Published open-source tools on PyPI for the developer community. Active technical writer sharing knowledge through Medium articles.
